field.label: Enable Email
field.help: Send alert notifications via email (uses system mail settings).

field.label: Recipient
field.help: Email address to receive alert notifications.

field.label: Minimum Severity
field.help: Only send email for alerts at or above this severity.

field.label: Enable Webhook
field.help: Send alert notifications to a webhook URL (Slack, Teams, etc).

field.label: Webhook URL
field.help: HTTP(S) endpoint to POST alert JSON payloads.

field.label: Minimum Severity
field.help: Only send webhook for alerts at or above this severity.

field.label: Enable Syslog
field.help: Forward alerts to an external syslog server (SIEM integration).

field.label: Syslog Host
field.help: IP or hostname of the syslog server.

field.label: Minimum Severity
field.help: Only forward alerts at or above this severity.
